mapper.select: SELECT up.user_problem_id, up.user_id, up.problem_id, up.grade, up.solve_count, up.last_solved_date, p.title, p.number, p.difficulty, p.site, p.link, p.description, pc.category_name FROM user_problems up LEFT JOIN problems p USING (problem_id) LEFT JOIN problem_categories pc USING (problem_id) WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND up.last_solved_date IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(up.grade) IN ('RED', 'YELLOW') ORDER BY CASE UPPER(up.grade) WHEN 'RED' THEN 0 WHEN 'YELLOW' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, up.last_solved_date ASC, up.user_problem_id ASC
